王权穿越到人与凶兽共存的世界，成为青城首富废物之子。
不过幸亏王权不出意外获得了屌丝逆袭神器。
在了解这个叫做‘游手好闲就能无敌’的系统后，王权认为这个系统大有问题！
每天喝茶钓鱼打豆豆，王权开启了自己的无限装逼之路！
大力药水，无限力量，一拳爆星！
能量小瓶，牛逼轰轰，搬山移海！
绝世手套，响指之下，无一存活！
看着无敌却什么天赋也检测不出的儿子，王霸业发出灵魂疑问：“我儿平日里到底怎么修炼的？”
龚青一脸懵逼：“少爷平日什么都没做，可他偏偏无敌了！”
丫鬟小柔仰天长啸：“少爷明明游手好闲，怎么会这么强？”
王权独自站在巅峰回首，无敌是多么寂寞！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ad8d4a0ed728f33f28058c3779b95025~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"格丽巧","author_id":"","book_id":"7208120543952768057","book_name":"少爷明明游手好闲，怎么会这么强","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7224046744471306813","read_count":"19","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"267140"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.8","serial_count":"122","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌,架空,东方玄幻,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ad8d4a0ed728f33f28058c3779b95025~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304390&x-signature=SkFIDPH37buLO5k1kFlFwx8Hcuc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.807782e+
